<div class="ewa-rteLine">Začin is an international restaurant where you can enjoy pleasant moments in the company of friends, business partners, or loved ones while indulging in exquisite dishes. The menu at Začin offers a variety of specialties from international cuisine, enriched with a combination of unique spices and flavors. Accompanying the rich menu is an extensive wine list featuring quality labels from local and international wineries. The experienced chef and friendly staff will be at your service throughout your visit, recommending and serving the perfect dish and drink.</div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine"> </div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine">In the modern and carefully designed ambiance, adorned with cheerful colors and meticulously selected details, you'll wish time would stand still. The interior features wooden elements that harmoniously blend with shelves displaying decorative wine bottles.</div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine"> </div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine">This restaurant is located on Tina Ujevića Street, which passes above Veliki Park and is just a few hundred meters away from the main city street.</div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine"> </div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine">Začin offers Mediterranean dishes that are sure to satisfy your palate. Take a break from your usual meals and indulge in the nicely cooked wok, soup, and steaks. Don't forget to savor the delightful wines available.</div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine"> </div>
<div class="ewa-rteLine">Thanks to its convenient location, you can easily reach this place even during peak hours. Many patrons have praised the patient and attentive staff. Prompt service is a notable aspect mentioned in customer reviews. Most reviewers have found the prices of dishes to be reasonable. The restaurant's fine decor and exotic atmosphere are highly appreciated. Google users have awarded Začin an average rating of 4.5 stars.</div>
</div>
<div> </div>
<div><strong>Adress: Tina Ujevića 13, Sarajevo 71000</strong></div>
